title: . Consultants and technical assistance, publication and research. In pursuing its objectives, the
content:
. Consultants and technical assistance, publication and research. In pursuing its objectives, the 
Council is authorized to set aside a portion of its appropriation for the hiring of the services of qualified 
consultants, and/or private organizations for research work and publication. It shall avail itself of the services 
of the Government as may be required.
